title: Cobblemon Smartphone Pokedex App
description: ARCHIVED - Pokedex app has been added to the smartphone mod
body:
# ARCHIVED - Pokedex app has been added to the smartphone mod

[Cobblemon Smartphone](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-smartphone)

---

# Pokedex App for Cobblemon Smartphone

Simple mod that adds a Pokedex App to the [Cobblemon Smartphone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-smartphone).

Config is located under `config/cobblesmartphone-pokedex.json` and has the following options:

```json
{
  "pokedexColour": "red",
  "actionEnabled": true
}
```

You can alter the `pokedexColour` to change the colour of the Pokedex GUI border as if you were opening it with an actual Pokedex item. If for some reason you want to disable the app, set `actionEnabled` to `false`.

You can use this in your modpack, but (if possible) please link back to the [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblesmartphone-pokedex) in your manifests instead of redistributing it directly.
